sourceOfTruthNotes: Keep in sync across marketing and app repos. Verify with npm run verify:pricing in the marketing repo.

plans.name: Starter
plans.audience: For independent contractors who need a dependable estimating and proposal workflow.
plans.usageSummary: Includes 50 AI requests and metered weather, map, and email usage each month.

plans.name: Professional
plans.audience: For contractors managing active field work, estimating, schedules, and change control.
plans.usageSummary: Includes 250 AI requests and expanded weather, map, and email usage each month.

plans.name: Business
plans.audience: For multi-project contractors that need expanded field capacity, reporting, and portfolio visibility.
plans.usageSummary: Includes 1,000 AI requests and the highest weather, map, and email usage allowances each month.
